news.headline: Metronet launches 100% fiber internet in Marshalltown, Iowa with speeds up to 5 gigabits per second for residents and 10 gigabits for businesses.
news.summary: Metronet, a leading internet service provider, has introduced its 100% fiber-optic internet service in Marshalltown, Iowa. The company, recognized as the "Fastest Major ISP" for two consecutive years by PCMag, is offering residents and businesses in the initial construction areas the opportunity to subscribe to their services. Customers can enjoy blazing fast speeds of up to five gigabits per second for residential use and ten gigabits per second for businesses and higher. Metronet's direct connection of fiber-optic cables to homes and businesses guarantees swift and reliable internet connectivity.

news.headline: VisualVault named Leader in G2 Fall 2024 Reports for Document Scanning, achieves high ratings in Document Management.
news.summary: VisualVault, based in Tempe, Arizona, has recently been recognized as a Leader in the G2 Fall Reports for Document Scanning. Users have given the company high ratings for Document Management, indicating high levels of satisfaction with the services provided.

news.headline: 2025 Jeep Grand Cherokee lineup starts at $37,035, offering improved affordability compared to previous models.
news.summary: The 2025 Jeep® Grand Cherokee lineup is now on sale at dealerships across the nation, with prices starting at $37,035 as per the U.S. manufacturer's suggested retail price (MSRP). This marks the debut of the fifth generation of the SUV, which is renowned as the most awarded in its category, boasting enhanced affordability.

news.headline: CAC Group introduces CyberPeril Pro, a cyber insurance solution for energy and utility industries. - DENVER, Oct. 21, 2024.
news.summary: CAC Group has reaffirmed its dedication to providing innovative specialty risk services with the release of CyberPeril Pro on October 21, 2024. This new cyber insurance offering underscores CAC Group's commitment to delivering cutting-edge solutions in the insurance industry. As a leading insurance broker and advisor, CAC Group's CyberPeril Pro provides a customizable and comprehensive cyber insurance solution for clients seeking protection in the digital realm.

news.headline: St. Regis Hotels & Resorts opens 60th property, St. Regis on the Bund in Shanghai, bringing timeless glamour to iconic area.
news.summary: Today, the renowned St. Regis Hotels & Resorts unveiled the opening of The St. Regis on the Bund in Shanghai on October 21, 2024. The new location seamlessly integrates the brand's classic charm and distinctive customs into the lively atmosphere of the legendary Bund area. This launch marks a significant addition to the luxury hotel market in Shanghai, with The St. Regis offering a unique experience for guests.

news.headline: US Leading Economic Index dropped by 0.5% in Sept 2024 to 99.7, following a 0.3% decrease in August. Between March-Sept 2024, LEI fell by 2.6%.
news.summary: In October 21, 2024, it was reported that the US Conference Board Leading Economic Index® (LEI) showed a 0.5% decrease in September 2024, dropping to 99.7 (2016=100) from a previous 0.3% decline in August. From March to September 2024, the LEI experienced a 2.6% overall decline. This demonstrates a consistent decrease in economic indicators over this six-month period.

news.headline: RTX's Collins Aerospace delivers upgraded Venue™ cabin systems with smart monitors & new interface. Inflight entertainment enhanced.
news.summary: Collins Aerospace, a business under RTX (NYSE: RTX), has unveiled a new Venue™ cabin management system in Las Vegas on October 21, 2024. This system includes a redesigned user interface and 4K smart monitors aimed at boosting system performance and streamlining operations. The initial deliveries of this system mark the beginning of an enhanced inflight entertainment experience for customers.

news.headline: Southern Comfort introduces SoConsole, a gaming accessory that dispenses 50ml shots of SoCo Sour, revolutionizing adult gaming.
news.summary: A new era in adult gaming has dawned with the introduction of the SoConsole, the world's first gaming console that can be outfitted with 50ml shooters of SoCo Sour. Unveiled in Louisville, Kentucky on October 21, 2024, by Southern Comfort, or SoCo as it's popularly called, this innovative console offers a unique gaming experience unlike any other.

news.headline: Global industrial control & factory automation market expected to reach $399.12 billion by 2029 at 9.3% CAGR from $255.88 billion in 2024.
news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, a recent report by MarketsandMarkets™ predicts significant growth in the global industrial control & factory automation market. The market is expected to increase from USD 255.88 billion in 2024 to USD 399.12 billion by 2029, reflecting a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 9.3% during the forecast period.

news.headline: Brooklyn artist Allison Eden Studios makes presidential portraits for auction to predict election; bids determine voter enthusiasm.
news.summary: Artist studio Allison Eden Studios has created two Presidential candidate masterpieces, which will be auctioned simultaneously. The artwork that receives the higher bid will indicate the level of voter enthusiasm and potentially predict the election winner. The pieces can be viewed in the studio.

news.headline: NASA uses Echolight's REMS tech to monitor bone during bedrest study for spaceflight simulations.
news.summary: In Houston on October 21, 2024, Echolight, a leading company in bone densitometry worldwide, revealed that NASA has incorporated its exclusive REMS (Radiofrequency Echographic Multi Spectrometry) technology for tracking bone alterations in a human bedrest examination. This will assist in evaluating the impacts of unloading on the body.

news.headline: LaSalle Investment Management receives seven 5-star ratings in the 2024 GRESB assessment, demonstrating strong ESG performance.
news.summary: On October 21, 2024, LaSalle Investment Management, a leading global real estate investment manager with headquarters in Chicago, London, and Singapore, revealed its performance in the 2024 GRESB assessment. GRESB is a globally acknowledged benchmark for Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) practices in the industry. This assessment helps companies measure their ESG performance and identify areas for improvement. LaSalle's results from this assessment highlight its commitment to sustainable and responsible investing practices.

news.headline: Labor negotiator Su is closing in on another victory, with negotiations expected to conclude with a 90% favorable outcome.
WCB workers in Canada discuss heavy workloads and need for more support from management at recent conference.
news.summary: In Halifax, Nova Scotia, injured Canadians depend on Workers’ Compensation Board (WCB) workers for expert care. A recent conference attended by members of the Canadian Union of Public Employees, National Union of Public and General Employees, and the Public Service Alliance of Canada discussed the issue of overburdened workers leading to delays in care for injured individuals. This is a significant concern as it impacts the efficiency and effectiveness of WCB services. The conference highlighted the importance of addressing workload issues to ensure timely support for injured workers.

news.headline: Tecum Equity invests in Kadon Precision and Aerospace, a Rockford IL based company specializing in aerospace and defense.
news.summary: On October 21, 2024, Tecum Equity disclosed their recent investment in Kadon Precision and Aerospace, a precision manufacturing firm located in Rockford, Illinois. Kadon specializes in serving markets such as aerospace, defense, space, and industrial products.

news.headline: Infinitum and Armstrong Fluid Technology to hold webinar on pump motor advancements in Austin. Date: Oct. 22.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, Infinitum is set to collaborate with Armstrong Fluid Technology for an informative webinar on pump motor innovations scheduled for October 22nd.

news.headline: GTS marks 10 years in CX & AI innovation with partners like Genesys, AWS, Google CCAI, and Zoom.
news.summary: In Alta Loma, California, on October 21, 2024, Global Technology Solutions, Inc. (GTS), an esteemed collaborator with Genesys, Amazon Web Services (AWS), Google CCAI, and Zoom, celebrates its significant milestone of 10 years in operation. The company expresses immense pride at achieving this anniversary, highlighting its successful partnerships with industry giants.

news.headline: TopGolf begins construction on 14th Texas venue at New Braunfels, located at 427 Creekside Way in a 400+ acre master-planned development.
news.summary: Topgolf has officially commenced construction on its highly anticipated two-level venue situated at 427 Creekside Way in Dallas. The venue, part of the New Braunfels Town Center at Creekside, a massive 400+ acre mixed-use development, is set to open on October 21, 2024. This marks a significant milestone for Topgolf's expansion plans in the region, catering to a growing audience of sports and entertainment enthusiasts.

news.headline: Rockline Industries donates 200,000 wet wipe packages for hurricane disaster relief in affected states.
news.summary: In response to the recent hurricanes, Rockline Industries from Sheboygan, Wisconsin, sent trucks carrying close to 200,000 packages of wet wipes to the affected states. The company made a substantial donation to aid recovery relief efforts in the affected areas.

news.headline: 6Storage teams up with Apoorva for enhanced self-storage software, launching 6Storage 3.0, promising cutting-edge technology and user experiences. St Louis, Oct. 21, 2024.
news.summary: A strategic partnership has been formed between 6Storage and Apoorva, a technology investment company, aiming to revolutionize self-storage management. The collaboration, announced on October 21, 2024, in St. Louis, promises to bring cutting-edge technology and improved user experiences to the industry. This alliance sets the stage for innovation in self-storage management, leveraging the expertise of the two companies. Exciting developments are expected as this partnership unfolds.

news.headline: Baha Mar hosts FUZE Caribbean Art Fair at Bahamas Culinary & Arts Festival from Oct 23-25, free entry offered.
news.summary: The upcoming FUZE Caribbean Art Fair at Baha Mar, a top luxury resort in Nassau, The Bahamas, is offering free entry from October 23-25, 2024. The event aims to showcase diverse artworks and talents from the Caribbean. Baha Mar, serving as a key location for the fair, is thrilled to welcome back this cultural celebration.

news.headline: Alliance for Aging Research releases film on new Medicare drug benefits in 2025 to help beneficiaries afford prescription medications.
news.summary: On October 21, 2024, a new educational film was launched by the Alliance for Aging Research, available in both English and Spanish. The film targets Medicare beneficiaries enrolled in Part D plans, informing them about two upcoming benefits set to roll out in 2025. These benefits are designed to enhance the affordability of prescription medications, with a focus on reducing financial burdens for the elderly population.

news.headline: US stocks decrease, Dow down 50 points, Dow at 43,219.80, NASDAQ at 18,487.82, S&P 500 at 5,862.15. Energy stocks rise 0.6%, real estate falls 0.7%.
news.summary: Stocks in the U.S. started the day mostly lower, with the Dow Jones index declining by over 50 points on Monday. As of the market opening, the Dow was down 0.13% at 43,219.80, the NASDAQ slipped 0.01% to 18,487.82, and the S&P 500 dropped 0.04% to 5,862.15. Energy shares saw an increase of 0.6%, while real estate shares fell by 0.7% in Monday's trading session. In recent news, Spirit Airlines, Inc. (NYSE:SAVE) adjusted its card processing agreement, extending the deadline for its 2025 notes to December 23 and the early maturity date to December 21. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Fiserv (NYSE: FI) set to report $2.26 EPS on 2024-10-22. Shares at $197.29, up 70.58% in 52 weeks. Analysts view Outperform, guidance key for stock movement. Another EPS beat may lead to price rise.
news.summary: Fiserv is scheduled to release its quarterly earnings report on 2024-10-22, with analysts projecting an EPS of $2.26. Investors are eagerly awaiting the announcement, hoping for surpassing estimates and positive guidance for the next quarter. In the past, Fiserv has beaten EPS estimates, most recently by $0.03, leading to a 3.2% share price drop the following day. The stock is currently trading at $197.29, up 70.58% over the last 52 weeks. Analysts give Fiserv an overall Outperform rating based on 20 ratings. Understanding market sentiments and expectations is crucial for investors before the earnings release.

news.headline: Astemo to showcase Keihin carburetors, Nissin brake pads, Showa suspension at AAPEX 2024 in Las Vegas. LOS ANGELES, Oct. 21, 2024. (Total products: 3)
news.summary: Hitachi Astemo Americas' Aftermarket Division will feature an increased range of Keihin carburetors, Nissin brake pads, and Showa suspension components at AAPEX 2024 in Los Angeles. The event, held at the Venetian Expo Center, is scheduled for October 21, 2024. The exhibition aims to highlight the growing selection of products, with a focus on innovation and quality. This showcase reflects the company's commitment to providing a comprehensive selection for consumers in the aftermarket sector. Don't miss the opportunity to explore these offerings at the upcoming AAPEX 2024 event.

news.headline: Fiserv's quarterly earnings anticipation: EPS estimated at $2.26, stock price history, trading at $197.29 with 70.58% increase in 52-weeks.
news.summary: Fiserv (NYSE:FI) is set to announce its quarterly earnings on 2024-10-22, with analysts estimating an EPS of $2.26. Investors are eagerly awaiting news of surpassing estimates and positive guidance for the next quarter, as guidance can impact stock prices. In the last quarter, Fiserv's EPS beat by $0.03, resulting in a 3.2% drop in share price the following day. As of October 18, Fiserv shares were trading at $197.29, up 70.58% over the last 52 weeks. Analysts have an Outperform consensus rating on Fiserv with an average one-year price target of $194.55.

news.headline: Vehicular homicide in Wichita, Kansas carries serious penalties including fines, restitution, and license suspension.
news.summary: In Wichita, Kansas, on October 21, 2024, it was reported that certain driving errors can have severe consequences, particularly when they result in a loss of life. Vehicular homicide, although often accidental, is treated as a criminal act and can lead to harsh punishments. These penalties include substantial fines, compensation to the victim's family, as well as the suspension of driving privileges. It is crucial for drivers to be aware of the gravity of such mistakes to prevent tragic outcomes and legal consequences.

news.headline: nCartes Inc. launches REDCap integration with UC Davis Medical Center to enhance clinical trial data fulfillment.
news.summary: In Fremont, California, on October 21, 2024, nCartes, Inc, an industry leader in EHR-to-EDC clinical trial data fulfillment, has successfully launched its integration capability with REDCap EDC in partnership with UC Davis Medical Center. This advancement aims to revolutionize clinical research practices by facilitating seamless data exchange.

news.headline: Veronica Beard and NFL collaborate on limited-edition Dickey Jacket Collection, presale starting Oct 21, launching on Nov 12.
news.summary: Veronica Beard has teamed up with the National Football League for an exclusive dickey jacket collection, now available for presale starting October 21st, 2024. The official launch of the collection is scheduled for November 12th, 2024 in New York. This collaboration introduces a limited-edition capsule of NFL-themed dickeys, combining style and fandom. Fans can secure their piece by participating in the presale, with a wide range of options to showcase their team pride. Be sure to mark your calendars for the official release date to get your hands on these unique NFL-inspired designs.

news.headline: Morse Micro wins Best Wi-Fi for Innovation Award at 2024 WBA Industry Awards. World's top provider of Wi-Fi HaLow.
news.summary: In Sydney and Irvine, California on October 21, 2024, Morse Micro, a top provider of Wi-Fi HaLow solutions, revealed their victory at the 2024 Wireless Broadband Alliance (WBA) Industry Awards. The company received the prestigious Best Wi-Fi for Innovation Award, acknowledging their excellence in the field. This recognition highlights Morse Micro's leadership in the industry and their commitment to pushing boundaries in Wi-Fi technology.

news.headline: Real Matters will reveal Q4 and fiscal 2024 financial results on November 21, 2024.
news.summary: A recent report reveals that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 3.8%, indicating a significant decrease from the previous month. This marks the lowest unemployment rate seen in over a year. The report also indicates that the economy added 250,000 new jobs in various sectors, surpassing expectations. This positive trend has been attributed to a boost in consumer confidence and increased spending. Additionally, average hourly wages have increased by 2.5%, pointing towards potential growth in personal income. Overall, these numbers reflect a thriving economy with robust job creation and declining unemployment.

news.headline: HSS appoints Daphne A. Scott, MD as Chief of Primary Sports Medicine. Specializes in Women's Sports Medicine.
news.summary: On October 21, 2024, the Hospital for Special Surgery (HSS) in New York revealed the selection of Dr. Daphne A. Scott as the sports medicine physician in the HSS Women's Sports Medicine Center and Lead. HSS, renowned for its focus on musculoskeletal health, appointed Dr. Scott to this prominent position, strengthening their team of specialists. This announcement marks a significant development for the leading academic medical center, further enhancing its expertise in the field.

news.headline: Live Oak Ventures invests in Synply, Inc., a cloud-based tech company revolutionizing loan syndication for banks.
news.summary: On October 21, 2024, in Wilmington, North Carolina, Live Oak Ventures, the investment division of Live Oak Bancshares, Inc., disclosed an investment in Synply Inc. This cloud-based technology firm focuses on revolutionizing the loan syndication process for banks.

news.headline: 12-time NYT best-selling author Don Yaeger joins Advantage and Forbes Books as Publisher, bringing expertise in business leadership.
news.summary: A notable development in Charleston, South Carolina, on October 21, 2024, announced that Advantage—The Authority Company has formed a partnership with Don Yaeger, a renowned author, keynote speaker, and business leadership coach, who will serve as the Publisher of Forbes Books. Yaeger, an impressive 12-time New York Times best-selling author, is set to bring his expertise to this new role.

news.headline: Wells Fargo Investment Institute raises 2025 year-end S&P 500 target range to 6200-6400 from prior forecast of 5900-6100.
Obligo secures $35M funding to expand security deposit solutions in millions of U.S. homes. Led by 83North and True Global Ventures.
news.summary: A venture capital round, jointly led by 83North and True Global Ventures, has secured funding to fuel growth in partnerships and the introduction of new products. The initiative, announced on October 21, 2024, in New York, is set to propel Obligo, a fintech firm specializing in cultivating trust between renters and landlords, through the launch of innovative offerings.

news.headline: Various business groups are lobbying Congress to limit Trump's ability to impose tariffs; includes technology firms, manufacturers, and retailers.
news.summary: Leaders from various technology companies, manufacturers, retailers, and agricultural producers are urging Congress to implement measures that would limit a president's power to enforce additional tariffs.

news.headline: Zip secures $190M in Series D funding led by BOND, bringing valuation to $2.2B, the largest investment in procurement tech.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Zip, a top AI-driven procurement platform, has disclosed securing a substantial $190 million in its Series D funding round led by BOND. This investment marks one of the biggest for an enterprise SaaS firm this year, propelling Zip's valuation to $2.2 billion, a notable rise from its 2023 valuation of $1.5 billion. Noteworthy contributors in this funding cycle include new backers DST Global, Adams Street, and Alkeon, alongside established investor Y Combinator.

news.headline: Stripe acquires Bridge, a stablecoin platform, in a $1.1 billion deal, marking a significant move in the crypto industry.
news.summary: The agreement, one of the most significant in the history of cryptocurrency, comes after Stripe revealed its intention to provide support for stablecoins earlier this month.

news.headline: DeVry University teams up with OneTen to offer scholarships and job opportunities to learners without four-year degrees.
news.summary: LISLE, Ill.-- DeVry University has revealed a new partnership with OneTen, an alliance of prominent employers dedicated to expanding prospects for qualified talent lacking traditional four-year degrees. Through this alliance, scholarships will be offered to assist eligible DeVry students in acquiring job-ready skills and to provide them with access to job openings from OneTen member companies. This collaboration underscores DeVry's dedication to bridging the opportunity divide.

news.headline: US Leading Index Change MoM Actual -0.5% (Forecast -0.3%, Previous -0.2%)
Grammarly introduces tools to measure AI ROI, including the first Effective Communication Score. ~100 characters.
news.summary: In a recent announcement from San Francisco, Grammarly revealed new resources aimed at assessing the return on investment of AI technology. Among these tools is the pioneering Effective Communication Score – an innovative metric in the industry. This development showcases Grammarly's commitment to enhancing communication effectiveness through AI, highlighting their dedication to advancing AI technology.

news.headline: Availity presents API-powered authorization solution at HLTH 2024, largest real-time health network, aiding providers and payers.
news.summary: Availity is currently presenting its advanced multi-channel, API-powered intelligent authorization solution at HLTH 2024, a major healthcare trade show in Jacksonville, Florida. As the largest real-time health information network in the nation, Availity aims to empower providers and payers with innovative technology. With extensive experience as a technology pioneer, Availity offers solutions to streamline processes in the ever-evolving healthcare landscape. This initiative is designed to enhance efficiency and connectivity, catering to the needs of providers and payers in today's complex healthcare industry.

news.headline: India EV market expected to intensify competition, growth by 2023-2030. Report explores trends, factors driving adoption. Regional variations highlighted.
news.summary: New research added to ResearchAndMarkets.com's collection is the "Electric Vehicle Market, India, 2023-2030" report, delving into the Indian EV industry. The report analyzes the factors influencing the market, focusing on trends, drivers of adoption, and growth prospects. It also sheds light on regional and state-level differences in EV uptake, pinpointing areas with significant EV penetration. This comprehensive study offers insights into the evolving Indian EV landscape.

news.headline: DELFI Diagnostics' study on cancer treatment monitoring in Nature Communications showcases results of clinical trial.
news.summary: A company specializing in convenient blood-based tests for cancer detection has released findings from a clinical trial in a prestigious peer-reviewed journal. DELFI Diagnostics, Inc., based in Baltimore and Palo Alto, shared the results on Oct. 21, 2024. Their technology offers accessible liquid biopsy tests for cancer screening.

news.headline: Analysts say election will significantly impact insurer merger plan.
Logan emphasizes Fed's need to keep flexibility on rates - source: Bloomberg.
First Student celebrates National School Bus Safety Week by highlighting safe, reliable rides for millions of families.
news.summary: In Cincinnati on October 21, 2024, First Student, a leading school transportation provider for millions of families, is commemorating National School Bus Safety Week by emphasizing the significance of secure and dependable transportation to and from school. The company is highlighting its advancements and commitment to ensuring safe journeys for approximately millions of students across the country.

news.headline: Southwest aims truce with Elliott post key policy changes.
Dr. Jessica Shepherd is appointed Chief Medical Officer of Hers by Hims & Hers; focuses on personalized healthcare for women.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Hims & Hers Health, Inc. shared news that Dr. Jessica Shepherd has been appointed as the inaugural Chief Medical Officer of Hers, a segment of the company. The leading health and wellness platform, Hims & Hers, which is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol HIMS, made this announcement as part of their commitment to enhancing personalized healthcare options tailored for women. Dr. Shepherd, with almost twenty years of experience, will play a pivotal role in steering the clinical direction of the Hers brand in key areas such as sexual health, dermatology, weight management, and mental well-being.
